welcome:
🌟 Welcome to TurkTextileHub!
Your smart platform for Turkish textile trade
role_selection: 👇 Choose your role to get started:
supplier_registration_start:
🏭 Great! Let's register you as a supplier on TurkTextileHub.
Please answer the following questions:
prompt_company_name: 📋 What is your company or store name?
prompt_contact_name: 👤 What is the name of the contact person?
ask_city: 📍 In which city is your store located?
prompt_phone:
📞 What is your phone number with country code?
Example: +90 5XX XXX XXXX
ask_sales_rep: 👥 Do you have a dedicated sales representative to receive orders?
registration_success:
✅ You have been successfully registered as a supplier!
Our team will contact you soon to activate your account.
already_registered:
⚠️ You are already registered on the platform!
If you face any issues, contact our support team.
error_general: ❌ An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
cancel:
🚫 Operation cancelled.
Type /start to begin again.
ask_trader_phone:
📞 What is your phone number with country code?
Example: +966 5XX XXX XXXX
ask_business_type: 💼 What type of business do you run?
trader_success:
✅ You have been successfully registered as a trader!
You'll be able to browse products and request quotes soon.
add_product_start: 📸 To add a new product, send me its photos (1 to 5 photos at once).
add_product_get_category: ✨ Great! Now choose the product category:
add_product_get_price:
💰 Enter the approximate price (optional).
You can write something like '10-12 USD' or 'Price varies by quantity'.
add_product_success: ✅ Your product has been published successfully! Traders can see it now.
add_product_no_images: ❌ No images received. Please send at least one photo.
not_registered_supplier:
⚠️ You must be a registered supplier to add products.
Use /start to register first.
browse_start: 🔍 Choose a product category to browse:
no_products_found: 😔 No products available in this category at the moment.
quote_request_sent: ✅ Your quote request has been sent to the supplier. They'll contact you soon.
my_channels_empty:
No channels connected yet.

Tap "Connect Telegram Channel" to link your first channel 🔗
dashboard_prompt: What would you like to do?
error_generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
welcome_new_user:
Welcome to TurkTextileHub! 🇹🇷

Turkish B2B Textile Platform.
_comment: Step 6 additions — Add these keys to the existing en.json file
channel_post_expires: ⏰ This request will expire in 24 hours
channel_post_approved: ✅ Product successfully published to the catalog!
channel_post_rate_limit: ⚠️ You've exceeded the daily limit (10 posts). The limit resets tomorrow.
channel_post_edit_what: What would you like to edit?
channel_post_send_title_ar: Send the new Arabic product name:
channel_post_send_title_en: Send the new English product name:
ai_extraction_failed: ⚠️ Could not extract product data automatically. You can edit it manually.
rfq_ask_quantity: What quantity do you need? (e.g. 50 pieces)
rfq_ask_size: What size do you need? (e.g. L, XL, or multiple)
rfq_confirm_prompt: Do you want to send this request?
rfq_success_note: The supplier will contact you soon.
rfq_save_error: Error saving request, please try again later.
rfq_date_required: Please enter the required delivery date.
trader_not_registered: Your account is not registered as a trader.
